name: control-mapping freshness gate: paywalled framework with a non-expired attestation under compliance/attestations/<framework>.yaml activates the control
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch compliance/attestations && echo "2026-05-12T08:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/iso-27001-a14.txt && printf "framework: iso-27001-a14
license_holder: Acme
license_expiry: 2099-01-01
" > compliance/attestations/iso-27001-a14.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/control-mapping-gate.sh" --framework iso-27001-a14 --control-id A.14.1 --paywalled --now 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z && echo ok 1>&2
